calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Doug Hulstedt (831.899.5900; doughulstedt314@gmail.com) Respondent in propria persona.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

The Court noted there was no compliance with tentative ruling rule.

Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KIMBERLY KIRCHMEYER, DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT's MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS:

The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court will sign the Proposed Order submitted by the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
